summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3B (Kitchen Portal MVP), Phase 3C (Daily Closing integration with Cashier shifts), and Phase 3D (DataTable rollout). All backend APIs functional (17/17 tests passed). Frontend UI fully operational with Kitchen Portal, Daily Closing integration, and DataTable components working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: All 17 API tests passed for Phase 3B/3C/3D features
Backend: Kitchen Queue API returns groups {queued, preparing, ready, served} + stats
Backend: Kitchen Ticket status updates (preparing/ready/served) with timestamps
Backend: Kitchen Waste API creates waste_log + auto stock_movement if item_id given
Backend: Kitchen Waste list with total_cost aggregation + filters (category, date range)
Backend: Kitchen Waste DELETE removes entries successfully
Backend: Kitchen Dashboard returns queued/preparing/ready/served counts + avg_prep_minutes + waste stats
Backend: Kitchen Access control - chef.sudirman can only see Sudirman outlet data
Backend: Daily Closing status returns new fields: shift_summary, shifts, discrepancies, checklist.cashier_shifts
Backend: Daily Closing discrepancy detection working (open shifts, cash variance)
Backend: Daily Closing can_submit=false when critical discrepancy present
Backend: Regression tests - all existing APIs (health, dashboard, outlets, menu, shifts) still functional
Frontend: Login as chef.sudirman@fnb.com / kitchen123 successful
Frontend: Portal Selector shows Kitchen as 'active' portal, navigates to /kitchen/queue
Frontend: Kitchen Layout with proper navigation (Dashboard, Queue, Waste)
Frontend: Kitchen Queue kanban board shows 4 columns (Queued, Preparing, Ready, Served)
Frontend: Kitchen Queue toggle 'Show Served' displays 4-column layout
Frontend: Kitchen Waste page - add waste entry via dialog with item name, qty, category, reason, cost
Frontend: Kitchen Dashboard KPI cards reflect real data
Frontend: Daily Closing page shows 'Cashier Shifts' as first checklist step
Frontend: Daily Closing System Findings banner displays discrepancies
Frontend: DataTable rollout - CashManagement page shows search functionality
Frontend: DataTable rollout - SalesSummary page shows sortable columns
Frontend: DataTable rollout - PettyCash page shows category filtering
Frontend: Regression - existing Record/Add dialogs still work in DataTable pages
Frontend: Indonesian UI strings properly displayed throughout Kitchen and Outlet portals
Integration: Cashier → Kitchen integration - paying POS order creates kitchen ticket with kitchen_status='queued'
Integration: Kitchen ticket status updates persist with timestamps (kitchen_preparing_at, kitchen_ready_at, etc.)
Integration: Waste logging creates stock_movements for traceability when item_id provided
Integration: Daily Closing integrates cashier shift data into closing workflow

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor DataTable pagination features not fully visible)
